testcase.name: test_patch_task_section_id_set_and_clear

failure.message: AssertionError: assert None == '83f3f3fe-1a91-4be6-be96-4e270c4e8c8c' + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfde4ca6a9500>('section_id') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfde4ca6a9500> = {'attachments': [], 'created_at': '2026-05-16T10:30:16.506749+00:00', 'date': '2026-01-15', 'details': '', ...}.get + where {'attachments': [], 'created_at': '2026-05-16T10:30:16.506749+00:00', 'date': '2026-01-15', 'details': '', ...} = json() + where json = <Response [200]>.json

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_v225.py:306: in test_patch_task_section_id_set_and_clear assert r1.json().get("section_id") == sec["id"] E AssertionError: assert None == '83f3f3fe-1a91-4be6-be96-4e270c4e8c8c' E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfde4ca6a9500>('section_id') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfde4ca6a9500> = {'attachments': [], 'created_at': '2026-05-16T10:30:16.506749+00:00', 'date': '2026-01-15', 'details': '', ...}.get E + where {'attachments': [], 'created_at': '2026-05-16T10:30:16.506749+00:00', 'date': '2026-01-15', 'details': '', ...} = json() E + where json = <Response [200]>.json
